meeting.track_notes: Poly. 2000m track inside the turf circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 440m run-in. Turf. 2800m triangular-shaped circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 430m run-in. DRAW: Poly: Low-number

races.race_name: IN THE BOX SEAT PODCAST BROUGHT TO YOU BY GALLOP TV MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE (Fillies)
races.race_type: For 2 yof R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Juvenile fillies on the poly should be interesting. QUERARISTINYFERARI is knocking on the door and can go close from a good draw over a trip which should suit. ROYAL CREST as only a length behind QUERARISTINYFERARI last time out but has a wide draw to overcome. MEEKSHA made a good debut behind a fair sort and has room for good improvement. SCAR- ET EMPRESS came from far back on debut. She can improve jumping from gate one and has a 4kg apprentice claim. MISS CHARISMA made a fair debut and can improve.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH DIAMOND RISE MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: PUTTHELIGHTSOUT is a juvenile taking on his elders. He showed good promise over 1600m at Hollywoodbets Scottsville and could make the grade. ROYALE JACKET is a long- time maiden but should enjoy this course and distance and could make a successful poly debut from gate one. PRINCESS TRIPPI has the form to be a contender in this line-up. She is getting closer and the track could be ideal. PLACE OF PRACTICE has run some cracking races and also has the pace to take to the Poly.

races.race_name: TOTE FOR THE WIN MAIDEN PLATE (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: PEACE ROSE has been costly. She has run well in all four starts but may be looking for the longer distance. GIMME THE POWER had some fair Western Cape form and should improve on her decent KwaZulu-Natal debut. She could open her account first time on the poly. CHOOKS KISS has fair form and with Gavin Lerena up is a runner albeit from a wide draw. BLEN- HEIM PALACE was not disgraced on debut and could improve.

races.race_name: BET WITH COLOSSUS POOLS EXCLUSIVE ON www.tote.co.za CLASS 5 (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: It could get close between Glen Kotzen stablemates GOLD GOLD BABY and VIXENS WAR. GOLD GOLD BABY impressed with her win on local debut and can follow up. The track could be ideal. VIXENS WAR finally got her confidence boosted. She can go on. PRINCESS PALACE ran a fair race last time over 1600m, should appreciate this step up in trip and has pole position. LA MADDALENA is 0.5kg worse off with PRINCESS PALACE after beating her last time by 1.20-lengths and she could also enjoy this trip. PRAISE DE LA REY has consistent form and could be in the money yet again.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: CHASING GOLD could still be on the up and can defy the handicapper from a good draw. She has a solid record of two wins and a second from three tries on the poly. RED CHORAL brings some fair Western Cape form into it. She is the one to watch. MISSISSIPPI SPICE is in fine form. CLOUDS CLEARING gave the winner weight and a fright last time. She could confirm. ROY’S GRACE is always thereabouts and with a 4kg claimer up has a chance although she has a wide draw.

races.race_name: JOIN THE SOCIAL SQUAD SYNDICATE TODAY www.socialsquad.co.za MIDDLE STAKES (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: TOMYRIS is holding form. She has yet to win on the poly but it could be a first. Watch out for SHE’S A BOMBER who needed her last run. She could improve. ICE RAIN beat TO- MYRIS narrowly last time on the same terms and now has a 2.5kg claimer up so has a big chance, although there is a reversal in draw fortunes. EDUCATOR has class and was a bit unlucky last time. She could make a fair track debut. SPIRIT OF SHIMLA is consistent and could be in the shake-up over the extra.

races.race_name: LIVE IT. LOVE IT. OWN IT. www.racecoast. co.za CLASS 5 (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: PLEASEDTOSEEYOU has been lightly raced of late. His last two runs aren’t bad and he could step up on the form from a plum draw. THE GLIDING FISH is versatile and is capable of going well in this kind of race. He has drawn well and must be included in all bets. LILTING SONG and WILLIAM OF ORANGE both produced good work to win but need luck from slightly wide starting stalls. MASK ON jumped from a decent draw for a change last time and ran a better race. HEAVEN’S WILL will be right there if repeating his last start which was over this course and distance.
